---
aid: amadeus:trip-parser
baseURL: https://api.amadeus.com
description: The Amadeus Trip Parser API parses travel booking confirmation emails and documents to extract structured itinerary data. It enables travel applications to automatically import bookings from email confirmations and build organized trip itineraries.
humanURL: https://developers.amadeus.com/self-service/category/trip/api-doc/trip-parser
image: https://kinlane-productions2.s3.amazonaws.com/apis-json/apis-json-logo.jpg
layout: api
name: Amadeus Trip Parser API
properties:
- type: Documentation
  url: https://developers.amadeus.com/self-service/category/trip/api-doc/trip-parser
- type: APIReference
  url: https://developers.amadeus.com/self-service/category/trip/api-doc/trip-parser/api-reference
- type: OpenAPI
  url: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/api-evangelist/amadeus/refs/heads/main/openapi/trip-parser-openapi.yaml
- type: JSONSchema
  url: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/api-evangelist/amadeus/refs/heads/main/json-schema/trip-parser-address-schema.json
- type: JSONSchema
  url: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/api-evangelist/amadeus/refs/heads/main/json-schema/trip-parser-air-schema.json
- type: JSONSchema
  url: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/api-evangelist/amadeus/refs/heads/main/json-schema/trip-parser-aircraft-schema.json
- type: JSONSchema
  url: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/api-evangelist/amadeus/refs/heads/main/json-schema/trip-parser-airdata-schema.json
- type: JSONSchema
  url: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/api-evangelist/amadeus/refs/heads/main/json-schema/trip-parser-arrival-schema.json
- type: JSONStructure
  url: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/api-evangelist/amadeus/refs/heads/main/json-structure/trip-parser-address-structure.json
- type: JSONStructure
  url: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/api-evangelist/amadeus/refs/heads/main/json-structure/trip-parser-air-structure.json
- type: JSONStructure
  url: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/api-evangelist/amadeus/refs/heads/main/json-structure/trip-parser-aircraft-structure.json
- type: JSONLD
  url: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/api-evangelist/amadeus/refs/heads/main/json-ld/amadeus-trip-parser-context.jsonld
provider_name: Amadeus
provider_slug: amadeus
slug: trip-parser
source_filename: trip-parser-openapi.yaml
source_heading: OpenAPI Specification
source_yaml: "openapi: 3.0.0\ninfo:\n  title: Amadeus Trip Parser\n  version: 3.0.2\n  description: \"\\nBefore using this API, we recommend you read our **[Authorization Guide](https://developers.amadeus.com/self-service/apis-docs/guides/authorization-262)** for more information on how to\n    generate an access token.\"\nx-release-note:\n  '3.0':\n  - First release of Trip Parser V3\nservers:\n- url: https://test.api.amadeus.com/v3\npaths:\n  /travel/trip-parser:\n    post:\n      tags:\n      - Travel\n      summary: Amadeus POST Trip Parser Request\n      operationId: PostTripParserRequest\n      responses:\n        '200':\n          description: Successful Reply\n          content:\n            application/vnd.amadeus+json:\n              schema:\n                $ref: '#/components/schemas/response_tripParser'\n              examples:\n                Successful Reply:\n                  value:\n                    data:\n                      trip:\n                        reference:\
  \ JUPDRM\n                        stakeholders:\n                        - name:\n                            firstName: MIGUEL\n                            lastName: TORRES\n                        products:\n                        - air:\n                            departure:\n                              localDateTime: '2021-06-16T08:36:00'\n                            arrival:\n                              localDateTime: '2021-06-17T00:00:00'\n                            marketing:\n                              flightDesignator:\n                                carrierCode: CM\n                                flightNumber: '644'\n                        - air:\n                            departure:\n                              localDateTime: '2021-06-16T11:21:00'\n                            arrival:\n                              localDateTime: '2021-06-17T00:00:00'\n                            marketing:\n                              flightDesignator:\n                 \
  \               carrierCode: CM\n                                flightNumber: '426'\n                        - air:\n                            departure:\n                              localDateTime: '2021-06-20T18:56:00'\n                            arrival:\n                              localDateTime: '2021-06-21T00:00:00'\n                            marketing:\n                              flightDesignator:\n                                carrierCode: CM\n                                flightNumber: '645'\n        '400':\n          description: |-\n            Bad Request\n\n            code    | title                                 \n            - | - \n            4926    | INVALID DATA RECEIVED                          \n            32171   | MANDATORY DATA MISSING \n          content:\n            application/vnd.amadeus+json:\n              schema:\n                $ref: '#/components/schemas/error_400'\n              examples:\n                Error 400:\n           \
  \       value:\n                    errors:\n                    - status: 400\n                      code: 4926\n                      title: INVALD DATA RECEIVED\n                      detail: >-\n                        Wrong file format! Please resend your file in\n                        HTML/PDF/EML format\n        '500':\n          description: |-\n            Internal Server Error\n\n            code    | title                                 \n            - | - \n            141     | SYSTEM ERROR HAS OCCURRED\n          content:\n            application/vnd.amadeus+json:\n              schema:\n                $ref: '#/components/schemas/error_500'\n              examples:\n                Error 500:\n                  value:\n                    errors:\n                    - status: 500\n                      code: 141\n                      title: SYSTEM ERROR HAS OCCURRED\n        '501':\n          description: |-\n            Not Implemented\n\n            code    | title\
  \                                 \n            - | - \n            141     | UNABLE TO SUPPORT\n          content:\n            application/vnd.amadeus+json:\n              schema:\n                $ref: '#/components/schemas/error_501'\n              examples:\n                Error 501:\n                  value:\n                    errors:\n                    - status: 501\n                      code: 141\n                      title: UNABLE TO SUPPORT\n      description: ''\n      requestBody:\n        content:\n          application/vnd.amadeus+json:\n            schema:\n              title: DocumentEnvelope\n              type: object\n              description: >-\n                Data model to convey any kind of document, any format with\n                associated meta data to help the identification and the\n                decoding.\n              properties:\n                payload:\n                  type: string\n                  description: >-\n                   \
  \ This contains the payload of the document. It can either be\n                    raw data or encoded data in b6se4. see details in metaData\n                    block.\n                metaData:\n                  title: DocumentEnvelope_MetaData\n                  type: object\n                  description: >-\n                    Meta data associated to payload inside document envelope,\n                    helping to read/understand the DocumentEnvelope payload.\n                  properties:\n                    documentType:\n                      type: string\n                      description: >-\n                        Type of the document in the payload defined by the\n                        \"grammarOwner\"\n                      example: pdf, xml, json, jpg\n                    name:\n                      type: string\n                      description: >-\n                        Document name: name of the document in the payload\n                        (namespace, see\
  \ domain)\n                    encoding:\n                      type: string\n                      description: 'Example: BASE_64'\n                      enum:\n                      - BASE_64\n                      - BASE_64_URL\n            example:\n              payload: >-\n                \n\
  \n# --- truncated at 32 KB (169 KB total) ---\n# Full source: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/api-evangelist/amadeus/refs/heads/main/openapi/trip-parser-openapi.yaml\n"
source_yaml_url: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/api-evangelist/amadeus/refs/heads/main/openapi/trip-parser-openapi.yaml
tags:
- Email
- Itinerary
- Parsing
- Trips
---
